opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is literally burning off, I'm covered in giant red welts, and I can't stop scratching. It came on out of nowhere about two hours ago and I'm scared it's going to close my throat.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The welts and burning blew up all over my body in the last couple of hours and the antihistamine I took did nothing — I'm home on my own and panicking that it'll spread inside and I won't be able to breathe.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 hours ago, not long after I got hot — the house was really warm
symptom_narrative.duration: around 2 hours and the welts keep coming up in new places
symptom_narrative.character: huge raised red welts and hives, skin feels like it's burning, and the itch is unbearable
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst flare I've ever had — I honestly can't stop scratching and I'm really worked up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my trunk, arms and legs — it feels like most of my body
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on fast and keeps flaring; new welts pop up wherever anything touches me
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — I took my usual antihistamine and it didn't touch it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: heat, and even my clothing seams — anywhere a seam presses, a new welt comes up in a line
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm flushed and sweaty and my heart feels like it's going fast because I'm so worked up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get skin flares like this from my mast cell / histamine problem, but never this big or this fast
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sit still, I'm pacing around scratching and I can't settle

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a mast cell / histamine sensitivity problem that a specialist has been looking into — I get skin flares from it
past_medical_history.how_managed: I take antihistamines and try to avoid triggers like heat

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one 10 mg tablet about an hour ago

allergies_as_reported.substance: no known drug or food allergy that I'm aware of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very anxious tonight about the reaction spreading internally and closing the airway

objective_data_offered.value: raised red welts and hives over most of my trunk, arms and legs — they look confluent in places
if I scratch or drag a fingernail across clear skin, a raised red line comes up within a minute exactly where I scratched
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-demonstrated on video, not a formal clinician-elicited test

objective_data_offered.value: my face and chest look really flushed and I'm sweaty
I can talk in full sentences and I'm not wheezing or struggling to breathe — my voice sounds normal to me
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-assessment of airway/voice, not a clinician airway examination

objective_data_offered.value: the house is really warm and stuffy
